steps.t: Ulishár suggested that the two of you meet up at the cross-road south-west of Gadim-ûn.
Ulishár stands beside the road, gazing eastward.
Ulishár has prevented a brigand from escaping Zakhûr: a brigand with a familiar face.
North-east of Zakhûr, Mashdagâl has surrendered his sword to you.
Ulishár has asked for the sword.
Ulishár asked to meet you on the eastern bank of the dry Usâl River in An Shêru.
Ulishár stands by the eastern bank of the dry Usâl River in An Shêru.
Ulishár is ready to meet you on the western bank of the dry Usâl River in An Shêru. He pointed out a place to the north-west where you might climb out…
Ulishár stands by the western bank of the dry Usâl River in An Shêru.
